hero.title: Sell surplus faster. Get better prices.
hero.subtitle: 101Recycle lets factories digitize surplus sales — collect offers from more recyclers and resellers, compare bids in one dashboard, and track every step from inspection to CO₂ reporting.

problem.title: Right now, selling surplus is slow, manual, and underpriced.
problem.intro: Most factories still sell surplus like it's 2005:
problem.point1: Phone calls, emails, WhatsApp, and Excel everywhere
problem.point2: Each department handles a different step with no unified system
problem.point3: Offers only from a small circle of buyers they already know
problem.point4: Hard to track who approved what, which offer won, and final prices
problem.result: Result: slow cycles, low competition, and lower recovery value on reusable materials.

solution.title: 101Recycle turns surplus sales into a digital workflow.
solution.intro: Instead of chasing offers manually, 101Recycle gives you one digital system to:
solution.point1: Upload surplus lots (with photos, specs, and conditions)
solution.point2: Invite recyclers and resellers to bid
solution.point3: Track approvals and awards across departments
solution.point4: Store certificates and generate reports on reuse and recycling
solution.summary: Every step — from inspection to final award — is tracked in one place.
solution.tagline: Upload once. Receive more offers. Recover more value.

video.title: See 101Recycle in Action
video.subtitle: Watch how factories are transforming their surplus sales process with our digital platform

centralized.title: Centralized control
centralized.desc: One system connecting operations, procurement, finance, and sustainability — with clear roles and permissions.

moreOffers.title: More offers, better prices
moreOffers.desc: Invite multiple recyclers and resellers instead of just the few you already know — increase competition and recovery value.

fasterApprovals.title: Faster approvals & sales
fasterApprovals.desc: Digital workflows replace email chains; everyone sees status in real time.

traceability.title: Full traceability
traceability.desc: Track each lot from inspection to award, with who did what, and when.

insights.title: Reuse vs. recycle insights
insights.desc: See how much material was reused vs. recycled and report on CO₂ impact.

audit.title: Audit-ready records
audit.desc: Keep all bids, decisions, and certificates in one place for compliance and internal audits.

howItWorks.title: How 101Recycle fits into your current process

step1.title: List your surplus
step1.desc: Upload items via form or spreadsheet; add photos, specs, and inspection notes.

step2.title: Set rules & approvals
step2.desc: Define who can list, who must approve, and thresholds for finance/management sign-off.

step3.title: Invite buyers to bid
step3.desc: Share lots with your existing buyer network and new, verified recyclers/resellers via 101Recycle.

step4.title: Compare offers & award
step4.desc: See all offers in one view, compare by price and terms, and award the winner with a click.

step5.title: Track certificates & impact
step5.desc: Store recycling/reuse certificates and generate reports on value recovered and estimated CO₂ savings.

stakeholders.title: Value for every team in the plant

operations.title: Operations
operations.desc: Free up floor space faster, reduce manual coordination time.

procurement.title: Procurement
procurement.desc: Standardized process for surplus sales, more competition, stronger leverage.

finance.title: Finance
finance.desc: Clear records for every sale, easier reconciliation, and better visibility on 'other income'.

sustainability.title: Sustainability / ESG
sustainability.desc: Track reuse vs. recycle, estimate CO₂ impact, and export data for ESG reporting.

tracking.title: Easily Track All Surplus Inventory Movement
tracking.subtitle: Monitor every batch from listing to final sale in one centralized dashboard. See real-time status updates, bidding activity, and complete transaction history.

finalCta.title: Ready to move surplus beyond phone calls and spreadsheets?
finalCta.subtitle: See how 101Recycle helps factories sell surplus faster, invite more buyers, and recover more profit — with full traceability from inspection to CO₂ reporting.

hero.title: Get direct access to factory surplus — in one digital pipeline.
hero.subtitle: 101Recycle connects recyclers and resellers to surplus lots from factories, with clear specs, photos, and digital bidding — so you can find better material, faster, and win more deals.

problem.title: Tired of waiting for random calls from suppliers?
problem.intro: For many recyclers and resellers, factory surplus comes through:
problem.point1: Occasional phone calls and chat messages
problem.point3: No standard way to compare lots or track what's pending
problem.result: It's hard to plan, hard to scale, and easy to miss good material because it was never shared properly.

solution.title: 101Recycle gives you a consistent, digital surplus pipeline.
solution.intro: 101Recycle is a platform where factories list surplus and scrap digitally — and buyers like you can:
solution.point1: Browse available lots with clear specs and photos
solution.point3: Submit bids digitally and track status
solution.point4: Build ongoing relationships with multiple factories, not just one or two contacts
solution.summary: Instead of waiting for the next phone call, you see new opportunities as soon as factories upload them.

video.title: See How Buyers Use 101Recycle
video.subtitle: Watch how recyclers and resellers are accessing more factory surplus opportunities through our platform

dailyRequests.title: See Multiple Requests Daily from Taiwan Factories
dailyRequests.subtitle: New surplus opportunities are posted every day from factories across Taiwan. Browse, bid, and win deals from a steady pipeline of industrial surplus.

moreDealFlow.title: More deal flow
moreDealFlow.desc: Access surplus from multiple factories, not just your existing contacts.

betterInfo.title: Better information per lot
betterInfo.desc: Get photos, specs, quantities, and conditions in a standardized format — less guesswork, fewer surprises.

digitalBidding.title: Digital bidding & history
digitalBidding.desc: Submit offers online, track which lots you won or lost, and learn what price points are competitive.

fasterDecisions.title: Faster decisions
fasterDecisions.desc: Factory workflows are digital, so approvals and awards happen faster.

trust.title: Trust & traceability
trust.desc: Work with verified factories; get digital records and certificates for your own reporting and compliance.

step1.title: Sign up as a buyer
step1.desc: Create your profile, specify materials and regions you're interested in.

step2.title: Browse or get alerts
step2.desc: See live lots or receive notifications when new relevant lots go live.

step3.title: Review full details
step3.desc: Check specs, photos, quantities, location, and closing time.

step4.title: Submit your bid
step4.desc: Enter your price and terms digitally; no need for long email threads.

step5.title: Win lots & build relationships
step5.desc: If your bid is selected, coordinate pickup and payment with the factory — and become a preferred buyer over time.

positioning.title: Built to help serious buyers grow their business
positioning.intro: 101Recycle isn't a public classifieds site. It's built for professional recyclers, traders, and resellers who want:
positioning.point3: A transparent way to compete and win more deals

finalCta.title: Get a steady stream of factory surplus opportunities.
finalCta.subtitle: Join 101Recycle as a verified buyer and start receiving structured, trackable surplus listings from factories — instead of waiting for the next random call.

autoApproval.title: 自動承認（有効期限）
autoApproval.subtitle: 有効にすると、有効期限前に提出されたリスティングは自動的に承認されます—管理者の承認は不要です。
autoApproval.addRule: 有効期限まで自動承認を有効にする
autoApproval.formDesc: 開始日と有効期限を設定します。この期間中、すべてのページからの新しいリスティングは自動承認されます。

autoApproval.enable: 自動承認を有効にする
autoApproval.rulesDesc: 有効期限まで管理者承認なしでリスティングを許可するルールです。

autoApproval.sellerRequestsDesc: 売り手が管理者承認なしでリスティングをリクエストしています。日付範囲（開始〜有効期限）で承認するか拒否してください。有効期限はいつでも更新できます。

approvalPending.message: Your listing has been submitted. Steps 3-7 will unlock after admin approval. We will notify you once it is approved.
approvalPending.afterApprovalLockOpen: After approval your lock is open—you can continue to the next steps.
approvalPending.editingPendingNote: You can update your listing below. Steps 3–8 will unlock after approval.

autoApproval.subtitle: Get your listings published automatically during selected periods—no admin approval needed.
autoApproval.howItWorksDesc: When auto-approval is active for a date range, any new listing you submit in that period is approved immediately. Steps 2–8 unlock right away.
autoApproval.step1Desc: Start date and end date. During this window, new batches are auto-approved.
autoApproval.step2Desc: Submit your listing in step 1. If the window is active, it is approved instantly.
autoApproval.step3Desc: Continue to inspection, bidding, and the rest of the flow without waiting.
autoApproval.managedByAdminDesc: Auto-approval windows are set by platform administrators. If you don't see an active window, your listings will follow the usual approval flow and unlock after admin approval.
autoApproval.whenPendingDesc: Thank you for listing. Your submission is waiting for admin approval. Steps 2–8 will open once it is approved. You can keep editing step 1 until then.
autoApproval.requestDesc: Ask admin to approve you for a date range. Once approved, you can list without admin approval until the expiry date.
autoApproval.requestDescWithDates: Request approval for a specific period (from date – to date). Admin can edit these dates and approve. Once approved, you can list without admin approval until the end date.
autoApproval.requestSent: Request sent. Admin will review and can edit the dates. You'll receive an email when approved.
autoApproval.enterRequestedDates: Please select both start and end date for the period you want approval.
autoApproval.invalidRange: End date must be on or after start date.

paymentLog.title: Confirm Payment
paymentLog.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to confirm this payment? Please make sure the payment has been received before accepting.
paymentLog.missingInfo: Payment or winner information not available
paymentLog.errorMissingInfo: Payment or winner information is not available.

meta.title: パワーセラープログラム - ダイレクトセールス | GreenBidz
meta.description: GreenBidzでパワーセラーになりましょう。産業機器や機械を100カ国以上へ販売。出品手数料無料、グローバルな露出、専任サポート付き。
meta.keywords: パワーセラー, 産業機器販売, 機械マーケットプレイス, B2B販売, リセラープログラム
meta.ogDescription: GreenBidzでパワーセラーになりましょう。出品手数料無料で世界中の認証済みバイヤーへ販売可能。
meta.twitterTitle: パワーセラープログラム | GreenBidz
meta.twitterDescription: パワーセラーになりましょう。産業機器を世界へ販売、手数料無料。
meta.breadcrumbLabel: パワーセラープログラム

hero.title: パワーセラーに応募する
hero.desc: フォームに入力してください。担当チームがご連絡し、プラットフォーム開始をサポートします。

form.title: パワーセラーに応募
form.companyEmail: 会社のメールアドレス
form.messagePlaceholder: お問い合わせ内容や販売したい商品についてご記入ください...

form.success: ありがとうございます。応募を受け付けました。担当チームより近日中にご連絡いたします。

errors.allFieldsRequired: すべての項目を入力してください。
errors.submitFailed: 送信できませんでした。もう一度お試しください。

globalExposure.title: グローバルな露出
globalExposure.desc: アクティブなマーケットプレイスを通じて、100カ国以上の認証済みバイヤーに即座に機器を紹介できます。

auctionTools.title: 高度なオークションツール
auctionTools.desc: 独自の入札エンジンを使用し、時間制オークションや「即決価格」出品を自由に管理できます。

marketing.title: マーケティングコストゼロ
marketing.desc: SEO、グローバルなメールマーケティング、リード獲得はすべて当社が対応。お客様は在庫調達に集中できます。

support.title: 専任サポート
support.desc: パワーセラーには、出品最適化や物流を支援する専任アカウントマネージャーが付きます。

onboard.title: オンボーディング
onboard.desc: パワーセラーアカウントに応募。認証後、バルクアップロードツールとダッシュボードにアクセスできます。

list.title: 出品
list.desc: 詳細仕様、写真、価格戦略（単品または一括）を設定して機械を出品します。

close.title: 成約
close.desc: 安全なポータルで問い合わせを管理し、自動請求システムで取引を完了します。

whyPartner.eyebrow: なぜ当社と提携するのか？

powerSellers.title: パワーセラーのために設計
powerSellers.desc: 個人ブローカー、地域ディーラー、企業の資産管理者まで、高ボリューム在庫を簡単に扱えるよう設計されています。
powerSellers.quote: 「101LABとの提携により、回転率が40％向上しました。国際的な煩雑さなしに海外バイヤーへリーチできる最も簡単な方法です。」

sellPage.newMemberDesc: {siteName}のアカウントをお持ちでない場合は、「登録」ボタンをクリックしてください。登録後、入力した機械情報は自動的に掲載されます。

sellPage.publishedDesc: ありがとうございます！チームが掲載内容を確認し、まもなく公開されます。ダッシュボードでステータスを確認できます。

sellPage.publishedStep3: 承認後、バイヤーから連絡が来ます。ダッシュボードで全て管理できます。
